summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of H1 Attendance Module (Presensi & Kehadiran). Backend APIs fully functional (27/28 tests passed). Frontend UI successfully verified with all views, tabs, and navigation working correctly.

minor_bugs.issue: Sales role cannot view shifts (returns 403 instead of 200)
minor_bugs.impact: Sales users cannot view shift information in read-only mode
minor_bugs.note: May be intentional RBAC design - sales role lacks hr.view permission

passed_tests: ✅ Authentication - All 4 roles (admin, manager, sales, warehouse) login successfully
✅ Seeded Data - Shifts (2), Geofences (2), Devices (1) present
✅ Shift CRUD - Create, update (PATCH), soft delete working
✅ Geofence CRUD - Create, update (PATCH), soft delete working
✅ Device CRUD - Create, update (PATCH), soft delete with device_token generation
✅ Attendance Daily View - Returns today's records (4 records found)
✅ CSV Import (ZKTeco) - Idempotent import working correctly (2 records imported)
✅ Manual Entry - POST /api/hr/attendance/manual working
✅ Recap - Monthly recap with totals and per-employee breakdown
✅ ESS /me endpoint - Returns employee attendance data with shift info
✅ Clock-in - POST /api/hr/attendance/clock-in working (geolocation handled gracefully)
✅ RBAC - Sales cannot create shifts/geofences (403 as expected)
✅ RBAC - Manager can create shifts/geofences (200)
✅ Frontend Navigation - SDM (HRD) group → Presensi menu working
✅ Frontend Navigation - SDM (HRD) group → Shift & Geofence menu working
✅ Presensi View - All 3 tabs visible (Kehadiran Harian, Rekap Periode, Import Fingerprint)
✅ Presensi View - Stat cards showing correct counts (Total: 5, Hadir: 3, Telat: 1, Perlu Review: 1)
✅ Presensi View - 5 attendance rows displayed with employee names, times, status
✅ Presensi View - Flagged record for 'Slamet Riyadi' with 'Perlu Review' status visible
✅ Presensi View - Entry Manual button present
✅ Setup View - All 3 tabs visible (Shift, Geofence, Perangkat)
✅ Setup View - 6 shift rows displayed with details
✅ Setup View - 'Tambah Shift' button visible
✅ UI Rendering - All data-testids present and functional
✅ UI Rendering - Indonesian language labels correct throughout
✅ UI Design - Consistent with existing design system
✅ UI Design - Proper spacing, padding, and layout
action_item_for_main_agent: One minor RBAC issue: Sales role cannot view hr/shifts (GET returns 403). Review if sales should have hr.view permission for read-only access to shifts. Otherwise, H1 module is fully functional and ready for production.
